grind.zh: 苦调粗,酸调细;淡了粉多水少,浓了粉少水多;水流快调细,水流慢调粗。
grind.en: bitter->coarser, sour->finer; weak->more grounds less water, strong->more water less grounds; fast flow->finer, slow flow->coarser.

roast.zh: 深烘磨粗温要低,浅烘磨细温要高;新豆要醒别急着,老豆磨细升点温。
roast.en: dark->coarser & lower temp, light->finer & higher temp; fresh beans->rest first, old beans->finer & warmer.

temp.zh: 酸升温,苦降温(仍优先调研磨)。
temp.en: sour->raise temp, bitter->lower temp (still tune grind first).

rule.zh: 一次只改一个变量(研磨/水温/粉水比/时间四选一),改完喝一口再判断。
rule.en: change ONE variable at a time (grind/temp/ratio/time), sip before the next.
